name: Washington L&I Asbestos Abatement Contractor Certification

agency.name: Washington State Department of Labor & Industries

updateFrequency: unknown for the lookup; verify against the official L&I Verify tool before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Washington L&I asbestos abatement contractor certifications
knownExclusions: This entry is scoped to asbestos abatement contractor certification and L&I verification metadata.
Individual asbestos worker and supervisor certifications, project notifications, local permits, and non-asbestos construction credentials are outside this source entry.
The official lookup path has not been adapter-reviewed for machine access.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not automate the L&I Verify lookup without a separate access-control, terms, and saved-fixture review.
publicRecordsNotes: Official L&I lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a certification, permit, or local authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official asbestos-contractor-specific bulk download has been adapter-reviewed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Washington L&I asbestos abatement contractor verification. L&I states that contractors and workers must be trained and certified to work with asbestos.
maintainerNotes: Do not treat asbestos certification as equivalent to general contractor registration; preserve separate contractor, worker, supervisor, and project-notification caveats.

researchEvidence.note: Official L&I asbestos certification page reviewed for asbestos worker, supervisor, and contractor certification context.
Official L&I asbestos topic page reviewed; it states that contractors and workers must be trained and certified to work with asbestos.
Official L&I Verify lookup reviewed as the public verification path for contractors, tradespeople, and businesses.

blocker.summary: An official lookup exists, but no stable asbestos-contractor-specific bulk or saved-fixture browser path has been adapter-reviewed.
